raw_response: Based on the detailed breakdown provided earlier, I do indeed agree with selecting option A ("To monitor disease trends"). While each of the other options—identifying high-risk populations, estimating disease incidence, and assessing service quality—are valid purposes served by HIV sentinel surveillance, they are secondary compared to the overarching goal of trend monitoring. Trend monitoring encompasses not just incidence estimation but also prevalence changes, risk factor identification, and overall epidemiological dynamics. Therefore,
